author: XIN
description: Render Obsidian image embeds as a lightweight slider and show image captions. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: XIN
manifest.description: Render image embeds as a lightweight slider and show image captions.
manifest.name: Simple Image Slider

name: Simple Image Slider

releases.author: xinworks
releases.description:
## Changes

- Improve the slide counter contrast so the index remains readable on dark and black images.
- Keep the counter compact with a subtle translucent background and inset border.

## Validation

- npm run verify
- Black image visual test confirmed the counter remains visible.

releases.author: xinworks
releases.description:
## Changes

- Add a clickable slide counter that opens a compact image list for quick slide switching.
- Keep the image list lightweight and article-friendly for README/demo usage.
- Refine the counter hover/focus treatment and remove the extra outer tooltip.

## Validation

- npm run verify

releases.author: xinworks
releases.description:
Preserve slider position after rerender.

- Remember the active slide for each slider block while the plugin is loaded.
- Restore by image path when a slider block re-renders after editing.
- Fall back to the nearest previous index if the active image was removed.
- Sync manifest and docs for 0.1.3.

releases.author: xinworks
releases.description:
Fix Obsidian Community automated review issues.

- Remove the redundant word from the plugin manifest description.
- Replace the builtin-modules package with Node's builtin module list.
- Remove !important from slider button styles.
- Keep the command palette insertion command from 0.1.1.

releases.author: xinworks
releases.description:
Add a command palette action for inserting an image-slider code block.

- New command: Simple Image Slider: Insert image slider block.
- Inserts a starter image-slider template when no text is selected.
- Wraps selected image embed lines in an image-slider code block.
- Document the command and hotkey workflow in the README.

releases.author: xinworks
releases.description:
Initial community release.

- Render Obsidian image wikilinks as a swipeable image slider.
- Show captions below slider images and ordinary image embeds.
- Support pointer drag, touch swipe, keyboard navigation, and article-style minimal controls.
